name: Knowledge Gap Blocker Proof Gate
purpose: Produce direct Project Model-owned Evidence that later-discovered prerequisites block exact Gap closures and Outcome Transitions without rewriting frozen acceptance semantics.

oracle.description: The fixed Knowledge Gap blocker proof test entrypoint must exist and exit zero.

rejects: a blocker source without an open governed Closure Contract, an unknown or already-closed Gap target, a duplicate, self-referential, or cyclic Gap edge, or a noncanonical exact Outcome route descriptor
retroactive removal, narrowing, or post-closure extension of a declared blocker set
a newly declared blocker paired with its matching target closure or Outcome Transition in the same amendment
a blocked Gap closure or exact Outcome route whose baseline-open direct or transitive blocker lacks an exact disposition
a blocker treated as cleared without its own atomic open-to-closed delta, governed Closure Contract proof, and prior target-Outcome implementation Contribution

residualUncertainty: Blockers preserve later-discovered prerequisites but cannot reinterpret frozen Outcome Criteria or prove the blocked capability themselves.
Cross-workspace Accepted history portability and authenticated multi-writer governance remain explicit Knowledge Gaps.
